vibe: Late-night deep house, city pop, and jazz explorations — groove-heavy cuts from adjacent worlds

tracks.name: Street Wave
tracks.reason: Deep house legend adjacent to Theo Parrish & Moodymann — lush, hypnotic grooves

tracks.name: Plastic Love
tracks.reason: City pop royalty, right next to Taeko Onuki & Tatsuro Yamashita in the canon

tracks.name: Two Thousand and Seventeen
tracks.reason: Electronic maestro adjacent to Floating Points — warm, shimmering textures

tracks.name: In Your Eyes
tracks.reason: Jazz collective bridging Yussef Dayes and Alfa Mist — instrumental soul

tracks.name: Come Find Me
tracks.reason: Electronic dance producer adjacent to Bicep & Moderat — euphoric and warm

tracks.name: Fists of Fury
tracks.reason: Jazz saxophone powerhouse — same spiritual jazz energy as Yussef Dayes and Ezra Collective

tracks.name: Come Down
tracks.reason: Funky soul-hop adjacent to Larry June & Masego — irresistible groove

tracks.name: Otoko to Onna
tracks.reason: Japanese funk/boogie queen — same world as Masayoshi Takanaka & Toshiki Kadomatsu

tracks.name: Cirrus
tracks.reason: Downtempo electronic beauty adjacent to Kiasmos & Floating Points

tracks.name: Je Ka Jo - Demo Mix
tracks.album: Turntables on the Hudson: Twenty Years of Good Vibes
tracks.reason: Deep house DJ royalty — spiritual house adjacent to Kerri Chandler & Osunlade
